creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to PauAmma from comment #7)

Good point, thank you. 

(I was disoriented by knowing of this bug, but _not_ finding it by clicking the first of the two bug icons at <https://www.freshports.org/ports-mgmt/poudriere/>. Compare with the summary of 254466, if you like; and I'm in #freebsd-bugs on IRC.)
